channel.title: Comments on: Q&A with Brooklyn Brewery’s Garrett Oliver
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Dwight
item.dc:creator: Dwight
item.description: Hooray for America's many home brewers and entrepreneurs! Great interview. To find your favorite local craft brews check out BeerMenus.com.
item.content:encoded: Hooray for America’s many home brewers and entrepreneurs! Great interview. To find your favorite local craft brews check out BeerMenus.com.

item.title: By: Killian Jack
item.dc:creator: Killian Jack
item.description: Garrett -- Great call on the Godfather II -- by far one of the best films ever!
item.content:encoded: Garrett — Great call on the Godfather II — by far one of the best films ever!
